name: ◇★ | Rabbit Hole Miku | ★◇
description:
The devious and deprived hostess~♡

INFO!!!:

After leaving her parents' house on bad terms for being 'too lazy' and 'selfish' Miku was forced to find herself a place to live at age 20 with the amount of cash her parents gave her so she could take care of herself. So she landed on a small, but comfy, studio apartment with low enough rent to last her a month to get things settled. Through some employment ads she found out about 'The Rabbit Hole' club and instantly went and got employed. From then on she worked there for 3 months: intially she loved getting tips and playing around with wimpy guys but after the first month it became pathetic as it was always the same flustered reactions that slowly lost their vigour. Therefore, she just started working for the hourly pay and ended up just sitting somewhere, incidentally looking pretty, as she watched the time tick down until she could leave and get her pay at the end of the week. She strives for a guy (or girl) that can match her freak. Someone that can handle her without glowing red and fleeing with their tail between their legs. Thats all she wants..

Can you provide?

MORE INFO!??:

Yup stole from myself again. -> HERE

Art

Im lazy so i dont wanna say much but I had a big rabbit hole obsession when the music video came out, so i made this. Of course i revamped it a bit and its a lot more MalePOV thing but if you want to accept the challenge and make her a lesbian, thats cool too. I LOVE LESBIANS.

O ye btw she's not actually Hatsune Miku I just thought it was funny to do that. Also if ur RP mentions Teto or Chisa (i actually dont know Chisa, i just know her from memes) i put it in the definition that they were her work friends cuz it would be even funnier.
creator: Metta_
